generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor current sensor measuring the current I_M of the permanent‑magnet synchronous motor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder mounted on the motor providing motor shaft angle r_M"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance GearboxEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary position encoder placed behind the gearbox providing output angle r_out"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxEncoderDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction
instance MotorCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance MotorEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance GearboxEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxEncoder
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑stamped array of measured motor current I_M"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngine
]

instance MotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑stamped array of motor shaft angle r_M from the motor encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngine
]

instance OutputPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑stamped array of gearbox output angle r_out from the secondary encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngine
]

instance DerivedTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Torque calculated from motor current I_M and motor parameters"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngine
]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular velocity derived from motor position data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngine
]

instance AccelerationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular acceleration derived from velocity data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngine
]

instance SysMLStructuralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML block‑definition diagram describing motor, gearwheel and cycloidal gearbox of the first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLTool
]

instance SysMLBehaviorModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML internal‑block diagram capturing dynamic interactions of the drive components"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLTool
]

instance SimulinkFrictionlessModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model representing frictionless behaviour of the gearbox for baseline comparison"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngine
]

instance SimulinkCoulombViscousModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model implementing Coulomb‑Viscous friction for the gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngine
]

instance SimulinkStribeckModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model implementing Stribeck friction characteristics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngine
]

instance SimulinkDahlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model implementing Dahl friction model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngine
]

instance SimulinkLuGreModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model implementing LuGre friction model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngine
]

// C11: Enablers
instance MQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker transmitting live sensor traces from the robot to the digital shadow"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeFrictionIdentificationService, DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance SimulinkEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink execution environment running friction and dynamics models"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeFrictionIdentificationService, ModelParameterUpdateService, ComparativeAnalysisService
]

instance SysMLTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML tool used for structural and behavioral engineering models (block‑definition & internal‑block diagrams)"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelParameterUpdateService
]

instance AssetAdministrationShell : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell providing standardized model integration and traceability"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTraceabilityService, ComparativeAnalysisService
]

instance UnifiedDashboard : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unified dashboard visualising measured and simulated data, insights and model deviations"
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardVisualizationService
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeFrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real‑time identification of static, kinetic and viscous friction parameters for the gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionLossInsight, MotionAccuracyImprovementAction
]

instance DashboardVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualisation of measured and simulated data, including friction losses and model deviations"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionLossInsight, ModelDeviationInsight
]

instance ModelParameterUpdateService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous model‑based update of friction parameters fed back to the robot controller for motion accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:provides MotionAccuracyImprovementAction
]

instance DataTraceabilityService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Traceability of data origins linking sensor traces to processed data and models"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataOriginTraceabilityInsight
]

instance ComparativeAnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Comparative analysis of simulated versus measured torque and angular velocity traces"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelDeviationInsight
]

// C17: Insights
instance FrictionLossInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight on the magnitude of static, kinetic and viscous friction losses in the gearbox"
]

instance ModelDeviationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight on deviations between simulated model outputs and measured sensor data"
]

instance DataOriginTraceabilityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight showing the provenance of each data trace from sensor to processed value"
]

// C17: Actions
instance MotionAccuracyImprovementAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic update of friction parameters in the robot controller to improve motion accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "None – the digital shadow is a passive, one‑way data consumer and does not push data back to the physical robot (digital shadow functions as a passive entity)."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous, real‑time (online) processing of incoming sensor streams; friction parameters are updated during robot operation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A purpose‑driven digital shadow (FrictionDerivation) linked to the asset (Mabi first axis); processing components (Simulation M, Simulation GW, Simulation GB) consume measured data traces and execute simulation models, producing simulated traces; all components are organised according to the Digital Shadow Reference Model (purpose, asset, source, processing, model, data trace, data point)."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operative/run‑time stage – the digital shadow is created and used while the robot is operating to identify friction and improve control accuracy."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Traceability of each data point back to its source and processing model; validation by comparing simulated torque/velocity traces against measured references; use of both white‑box (analytical) and black‑box (data‑driven) friction models; continuous re‑identification to capture wear and temperature effects, ensuring model fidelity over time."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Sensor data are streamed from the robot to the digital shadow using the MQTT protocol."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Use of the Asset Administration Shell (AAS) standard, SysML modeling standards, and the Digital Shadow Reference Model (UML) as a normative framework."
]
